title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 115.339 - Nominations, how made
text:
115.339.  Nominations, how made. — Except as otherwise provided in this subchapter, all candidates for elective office shall be nominated at a primary election in accordance with the provisions of sections 115.339 through 115.405 of this subchapter.
(L. 1977 H.B. 101 § 10.080) 
Effective 1-01-78
